name: Fuchka Fusions
overview: Six friends leave their secure jobs to embark on a dream journey—Cafe Amar, a new startup in Kolkata, which quickly becomes the city's most popular hangout. But behind the popularity, divisions, egos, and financial chaos begin to emerge. One night, they suddenly shut down everything and disappear. Cut off from the digital world, they move to a remote village. Will they be able to settle into their new lives? Or will old mistakes drag them back into the darkness?

trailers.title: 🎬 ফুচকা Fusions | Trailer | ফুচকাা - Fuchkaa | Sidhu | Pabitra | Tubai
